mapper.insert:
SELECT member_seq.nextval FROM dual
INSERT INTO member( memberno, mname, id, passwd, passwd2, nickname, profile, birthdate, gender, zipcode, address1, address2, tel, guardian_name, guardian_relationship, guardian_email, guardian_phone, guardian2_name, guardian2_relationship, guardian2_email, guardian2_phone, point,sticker, provider ) VALUES ( #{memberno}, #{mname}, #{id}, #{passwd}, #{passwd2}, #{nickname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{profile}, #{birthdate}, #{gender}, #{zipcode}, #{address1}, #{address2}, #{tel}, #{guardian_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{guardian_relationship, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{guardian_email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{guardian_phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{guardian2_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{guardian2_relationship, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{guardian2_email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{guardian2_phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{point, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{sticker, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{provider, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT memberno, mname, id, passwd, passwd2, nickname, profile, birthdate, gender, zipcode, address1, address2, tel, guardian_name, guardian_relationship, guardian_email, guardian_phone, guardian2_name, guardian2_relationship, guardian2_email, guardian2_phone, login_time, logout_time, point, sticker, provider FROM member WHERE memberno = #{memberno}
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET mname = #{mname}, id = #{id}, passwd = #{passwd}, passwd2 = #{passwd2}, nickname = #{nickname}, profile = #{profile}, birthdate = #{birthdate}, gender = #{gender}, zipcode = #{zipcode}, address1 = #{address1}, address2 = #{address2}, tel = #{tel}, guardian_name = #{guardian_name}, guardian_relationship = #{guardian_relationship}, guardian_email = #{guardian_email}, guardian_phone = #{guardian_phone}, guardian2_name = #{guardian2_name}, guardian2_relationship = #{guardian2_relationship}, guardian2_email = #{guardian2_email}, guardian2_phone = #{guardian2_phone}, point = #{point}, grade = #{grade}, sticker = #{sticker}, login_time = #{login_time}, logout_time = #{logout_time}, provider = #{provider}, WHERE memberno = #{memberno}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE id = #{id} AND passwd = #{passwd}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT memberno, id, mname, passwd, passwd2, nickname, profile, birthdate, gender, zipcode, address1, address2, tel, guardian_name, guardian_relationship, guardian_email, guardian_phone, guardian2_name, guardian2_relationship, guardian2_email, guardian2_phone, login_time, logout_time, point, sticker, provider FROM member WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT memberno, id, mname, tel, address1, mdate, grade FROM member ORDER BY memberno DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET point = point + #{amount} WHERE memberno = #{memberno}
mapper.select: SELECT point FROM member WHERE memberno = #{memberno}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member
id LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR mname LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
